claims.text: 800 GitHub stars on the VectorForge inference runtime

evidence.snippet: vectorforge — low-latency inference runtime. 812 stars, 47 forks, last commit 2 days ago.

trust.note: [seed fixture] Repo star count (812) matches the deck's ~800 claim.

claims.text: Show HN launch reached the front page

evidence.snippet: Show HN: VectorForge – 3x faster quantized inference on commodity GPUs (287 points, 94 comments)

trust.note: [seed fixture] Show HN post at 287 points is consistent with a front-page run.

claims.text: Founder spent 4 years as an inference engineer on a production ML serving team

evidence.snippet: Lena Vogt — Berlin. 1.4k followers. Repos: vectorforge, kv-cache-bench, triton-kernels-notes.

trust.note: [seed fixture] Public repo history is consistent with a deep inference background.

claims.text: Sub-50ms p99 cold start for 7B quantized models

trust.note: [seed fixture] Benchmark is self-reported; no independent third-party reproduction found.

claims.text: Inference tooling spend is growing as open-weight models displace hosted APIs

trust.note: [seed fixture] Directionally plausible but no cited source in the deck.

claims.text: 2,000 paying developers on the platform
